content:
[{'text': "Good, I'm back in the white corridor. The map shows the robot is at the right side of the middle corridor. Looking at the map image, I can see the green destination is in the upper-right area. The black walls between corridors appear solid. 

Let me reconsider the map layout. The map shows:
- Upper black wall (top)
- Upper white corridor (where green destination is)
- Middle black wall
- Middle white corridor (where I am)
- Lower black wall
- Lower white corridor
- Bottom black wall

The vertical passages must exist somewhere. Looking at the image, there seems to be a small gap in the middle black wall near the center-right area (around x=320 pixels in the image). Let me try going back left to find a passage.

Let me rotate to face left and explore.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01RN2xK4LvKGTuLX5Bu3Fk2S', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': 180}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
